The # skip services (Train) field presented in this report reflects the new measure reporting requirements incorporated in the new contract."}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":""}]},{"textRuns":[{"value":"The definition of % on-time has changed for tram operator, Yarra Trams. From this date punctuality will be measured based on when a service "},{"value":"arrives","textStyle":{"textDecoration":"underline"}},{"value":" at a punctuality monitoring point for lateness and when it "},{"value":"departs","textStyle":{"textDecoration":"underline"}},{"value":" from that point for earliness. Previously only the departure time was used. This new approach more closely aligns with the key passenger outcomes (did I miss the tram because it was running early or was I late to my appointment because the tram arrived late) and how the new EOPR incentive regime determines early and late running. In this report historical information is adjusted to provide a consistent measure of performance over time."}]}]}}]},"vcObjects":{"general":[{"properties":{"altText":{"expr":{"Literal":{"Value":"'Notes about the information in this report'"}}}}}],"title":[{"properties":{"fontSize":{"expr":{"Literal":{"Value":"10L"}}},"show":{"expr":{"Literal":{"Value":"true"}}},"text":{"expr":{"Literal":{"Value":"'About the information in this report'"}}}}}]}}}
